title: helia elisabethae
intro: Helia elisabethae, also known as the Elizabeth's helia, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Helia elisabethae include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Helia elisabethae can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
